generated.description: This is an autogenerated partial class definition of 'ThermalUtilizationFactor'

description*.en: The "Thermal Utilization Factor" in an infinite medium, is the ratio of the number of thermal absorbed in a fissionable nuclide or in a nuclear fuel, as specified, to the total number of thermal neutrons absorbed.

title: ThermalUtilizationFactor
description: The "Thermal Utilization Factor" in an infinite medium, is the ratio of the number of thermal absorbed in a fissionable nuclide or in a nuclear fuel, as specified, to the total number of thermal neutrons absorbed.
